message:
fix: add freshness indicators and wire demo mode subscription (#3276) (#3325)

- Add RefreshIndicator to cards that use caching but had no freshness
  display: PVCStatus, GPUStatus, ClusterComparison, ChartVersions,
  OpenFeatureStatus, StrimziStatus, and Weather
- Replace inline RefreshCw spinner + useFormatRelativeTime with the
  shared RefreshIndicator component in OpenFeatureStatus and StrimziStatus
- Wire useDemoMode subscription in StrimziStatus so it re-renders when
  demo mode toggles and suppresses "not-installed" state during demo
- Add lastRefresh to UseStrimziStatusResult and UseOpenFeatureStatusResult
  interfaces so the component can pass it to RefreshIndicator

Closes #3276

Signed-off-by: Andy <andy@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
